About Us

One group, built for Nigeria's biggest projects

Fabulous Logistics & Services Ltd (RC 1142415) is an Abuja-based, multi-division group delivering integrated solutions across Nigeria and, for our logistics work, across partner African countries. What started as a travel and logistics company has grown into eight specialist divisions working under one roof: Travel, Tours & Immigration; Information Technology; Power & Energy; Construction & Infrastructure; Logistics & Supply Chain; Engineering; Pest Control; and Agriculture & Support Services.

Whichever division you need, you get the same standard: professional teams, transparent pricing and dependable delivery, from first enquiry to project handover.

8 Specialist Divisions Abuja Headquartered Nationwide Reach RC 1142415
Explore Our Divisions

Our Divisions

One group, eight areas of expertise

Fabulous Logistics & Services Ltd is a multi-division group. Tap a division below to jump straight to the detail that matters to you.

Travel, Tours & Immigration

Flights, study abroad, visas, business & corporate travel.

Information Technology

Networks, data infrastructure, ICT procurement & support.

Power & Energy

Substations, transmission lines, transformers & renewables.

Construction & Infrastructure

Building works, highways & road rehabilitation.

Logistics & Supply Chain

Freight forwarding, warehousing, customs clearing, haulage.

Engineering Services

Civil, electro-mechanical, hydropower & design.

Pest Control

Residential, commercial & industrial pest management.

Agriculture & Support

Agri-development, feasibility studies, capacity building.

Division 01 · Travel, Tours & Immigration

Every step of your journey, handled

From the first flight search to the final visa stamp, our services are designed to move you forward with confidence.

Travel & Tours

Curated holiday and leisure packages to top destinations, planned down to the last detail.

Flight Ticket Booking

Best-value fares across major airlines, booked quickly with real-time confirmation.

Study Abroad

Admissions guidance, university selection and visa support for students headed overseas.

Business Travel

Corporate itineraries, conference travel and executive bookings managed end-to-end.

Visa Guidance

Document checklists, application review and interview prep for higher approval odds.

Travel Consultation

One-on-one planning sessions to map out routes, budgets and paperwork before you commit.

Study Abroad

Your seat at a global university, secured

We guide students from first enquiry to first day on campus — matching ambitions to the right school, and handling the paperwork in between.

  • Admission Guidance — course and school shortlists matched to your goals.
  • University Selection — comparing costs, rankings and locations side by side.
  • Application Processing — forms, transcripts and references, done right the first time.
  • Visa Assistance — documentation and interview coaching for student visas.
  • Pre-departure Support — flights, accommodation and what to expect on arrival.
Start My Study Abroad Journey

Business Travel

Corporate trips, handled with precision

Meetings, conferences and executive travel need zero surprises. We coordinate every leg so your team can focus on the work.

Corporate Travel

Managed itineraries for teams and executives.

Conference Travel

Group bookings for summits and events abroad.

Business Meetings Abroad

Fast turnaround for short-notice engagements.

Executive Flight Booking

Premium cabin options and flexible fares.

Plan a Corporate Trip

Corporate Travel Support

One point of contact, start to finish.

Visa & Immigration

Paperwork, without the panic

We prepare and review every document before it's submitted, and coach you through interviews so nothing catches you off guard — for tourist, student, business or immigration visas.

Division 02 · Information Technology Services

ICT infrastructure that just works

From structured cabling to full data-room builds, our IT team plans, installs and maintains the technology backbone that keeps offices, banks and public institutions running.

  • Network & Structured Cabling — installation, rerouting and rehabilitation of data and voice networks.
  • Data Centre & Server Room Builds — design, fit-out and maintenance of secure server environments.
  • Telecoms & VSAT Installation — tower, satellite dish and communications equipment deployment.
  • ICT Procurement & Supply — hardware, software and equipment sourced from authorised partners.
  • Systems Integration & Support — implementation, training and ongoing technical support.
Discuss an IT Project

IT, Construction & Engineering line: 0816 166 4764

Full ICT Lifecycle

From cabling to systems support, one team.

On-Site Power Expertise

Certified engineers, safety-first execution.

Division 03 · Power & Energy Services

Powering sites that can't afford downtime

We install, maintain and rehabilitate the electrical infrastructure that keeps facilities, estates and public institutions running reliably.

  • Substation Installation & Maintenance — new builds and rehabilitation of existing substations.
  • Power Transmission & Distribution — line construction and distribution network works.
  • Transformer Installation — supply, installation and rehabilitation of transformers.
  • Renewable Energy Solutions — solar and alternative power systems for sites off the grid.
  • Emergency Repairs — rapid-response maintenance to minimise downtime.
Request a Power Assessment

Division 04 · Construction & Infrastructure Services

Building and roads, done to standard

We design, build and rehabilitate structures and roads, from bill-of-quantity preparation through supervision and materials procurement.

ISS 2500 Soil Stabilizer

A modern method for stronger, more durable roads.

Building Works

Construction and rehabilitation of low- and medium-rise residential & commercial structures.

Highway & Road Works

Earthworks, asphalt and bitumen application, drainage and shoulder construction.

Planning & Design

Outline design, planning applications and structural/architectural services.

Tendering & Supervision

Bill of quantities, pricing schedules and full site supervision.

Materials Procurement

Sourcing of building and construction materials, locally and internationally.

Discuss a Construction Project

IT, Construction & Engineering line: 0816 166 4764

Division 05 · Logistics & Supply Chain Management

The division our name comes from

Integrated logistics and supply chain solutions across African countries — moving goods reliably from origin to destination, with full visibility along the way.

  • Logistics Management — end-to-end planning of transportation and distribution.
  • Freight Forwarding — air, sea and road freight coordination.
  • Warehousing & Distribution — secure storage and last-mile delivery.
  • Customs Clearing — documentation and clearance handled by experienced agents.
  • Procurement & Haulage — sourcing, project cargo and heavy haulage support.
Talk to Our Logistics Team

Regional Reach

Operating to the rules of every partner African country.

Division 06 · Engineering Services

Technical depth across disciplines

Our technical operations span dams and hydropower, water and civil engineering through to architectural design — backed by specialist partner organisations where needed.

Civil Engineering

Structural and site engineering services.

Electro-Mechanical

Mechanical and electrical installation works.

Dams, Water & Irrigation

Hydropower, water resources and hydrological studies.

Architectural & Landscape

Interior, architectural and landscape design.

Speak with an Engineer

IT, Construction & Engineering line: 0816 166 4764

Division 07 · Pest Control Services

Safe, effective pest management

Eco-friendly pest control solutions for homes, businesses and public facilities, delivered by a quick-response team.

Mosquitoes
Cockroaches
Rats & Rodents
Termites
Bed Bugs
Snakes

Residential, commercial and industrial coverage, with eco-friendly products and safe, reliable service protocols.

Book a Pest Inspection

Quick Response Team

Safe, reliable, eco-friendly treatment.

Division 08 · Agriculture & Support Services

Growing capacity, not just crops

Mechanised farming and non-technical support services that build capacity for agricultural and community development projects.

  • Agricultural Development — crop farming, livestock, poultry and fish farming support.
  • Feasibility Studies — groundwork and assessment for new projects.
  • Project Financing Advisory — structuring support for qualifying projects.
  • Entrepreneurship & Capacity Building — human capacity development programmes.
  • General Supplies — sourcing and supply of general goods and materials.
Discuss an Agri-Development Project

Testimonials

One client story from every division

Real feedback from clients across all eight divisions of Fabulous Logistics & Services Ltd.

“My Canada study visa felt impossible until Fabulous Logistics took over. Every document was reviewed twice, and I got my approval in weeks.”

Amaka Nwosu

Study Abroad Client · Division 01

“Our office network and server room were a mess until this team redid the cabling and set up proper racks. Everything just works now.”

Tunde Bakare

IT Services Client · Division 02

“They rehabilitated our estate's substation within days, and the transformer hasn't given us a single problem since.”

Ifeanyi Okonkwo

Power & Energy Client · Division 03

“From the bill of quantities to final handover, the supervision on our building project was thorough and genuinely professional.”

Ngozi Eze

Construction Client · Division 04

“Our freight kept getting held up at customs until we brought this team in. Clearing is smooth now, and warehousing is reliable.”

Emeka Obi

Logistics Client · Division 05

“Their civil engineering team caught a structural issue on our site early, which could have cost us far more later on.”

Chukwuma Diké

Engineering Client · Division 06

“Termites had gotten into our office furniture. Their team treated the whole building, and it has stayed clear for months.”

Blessing Audu

Pest Control Client · Division 07

“The feasibility study and agricultural support we received helped us restructure our farm for the better.”

The Balogun Family

Agriculture & Support Client · Division 08

FAQ

Questions, answered across every division

We are a multi-division group offering Travel, Tours & Immigration, Information Technology, Power & Energy, Construction & Infrastructure, Logistics & Supply Chain, Engineering, Pest Control, and Agriculture & Support Services, all under one roof.

Processing time depends on destination and visa type, ranging from a few days to several weeks. We give you a realistic timeline after reviewing your documents.

Yes — from shortlisting universities to preparing and submitting your application, our Travel & Immigration team guides you the whole way.

Yes. Our Logistics & Supply Chain division manages freight forwarding, warehousing, distribution and customs clearing across Nigeria and partner African countries.

Yes. Our Information Technology division handles structured cabling, data centre and server room builds, telecoms installation, ICT procurement and ongoing support.

Yes. Our Power & Energy division installs and maintains substations, transformers and distribution lines, and delivers renewable energy solutions.

We handle building works, highway and road rehabilitation, civil and electro-mechanical engineering, dams and hydropower, water resources studies, and architectural and landscape design.

Yes. We use eco-friendly, professionally applied treatments designed for safe use in residential, commercial and industrial settings.

Yes. Our Agriculture & Support division assists with agricultural development, feasibility studies, project financing advisory and human capacity building.

Absolutely. Most of our consultations happen over WhatsApp or a scheduled call, wherever you are based.

The fastest way is WhatsApp at 0803 641 4646 for general enquiries, or 0816 166 4764 for Construction, Engineering and IT. You can also fill in the form below and we will respond promptly.
